pr.title: Add install and update instructions to Vendor Libraries page
pr.body:
The Vendor Libraries page listed available libraries but had no instructions on how to actually install or update them in VS Code.

## Changes

- **Installing Vendor Libraries** — new section with steps: open command palette → `WPILib: Manage Vendor Libraries` → `Install new libraries (online)` → paste JSON URL
- **Updating Vendor Libraries** — new section with steps: open command palette → `WPILib: Manage Vendor Libraries` → `Check for updates (online)`
pr.author: Copilot
